matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a IL6 inflammatory cytokine signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk and Inflammation and acute-phase response context, Autoimmune and infection association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: GT-confirmed rs1800795 (IL6 -174G>C) dosage suggests this sample carries the IL6 prediction context described by the gene-level thesis. The variant observed in this sample suggests a IL6 inflammatory cytokine signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk and Inflammation and acute-phase response context, Autoimmune and infection association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. This specific marker is curated as IL6 promoter association marker. rs1800795 (IL6 -174G>C) is curated as a IL6 marker for Inflammation and acute-phase response context, Autoimmune and infection association research. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched rs1800795 (IL6 -174G>C) at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the IL6 prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.
variant_prediction_rules.basis: Can modify or tag IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: Gene-name-related mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses rows whose gene annotation explicitly names the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: All numeric-row mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses every numeric beta value that survived preprocessing for the current sample.
